title: agrostis capillaris var. glaucina
intro: Agrostis capillaris var. glaucina, also known as red top bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The health benefits of Agrostis capillaris var. glaucina include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Agrostis capillaris var. glaucina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
